calendar.matters:
DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-18-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:

DEFENDANT MARK GONZALES, ROBIN WALTER'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OFF CALENDAR. FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED 3/18/11 AND JUDGMENT ENTERED 4/11/11. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 (301/PJB)

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-11-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: J. Willis-McGhee,
CSR: B. Fields #7235

Arnold Evje, Esq. for Plaintiff: M.D. Patel d.b.a. Frances Hotel
Plaintiff's Witness Mike Patel was placed under oath and direct examined.
No appearance by Defendant Robin M. Walter & Mike Gonzales.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff and against defendant for Judgment as follows:

Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 2084 Mission St, #208, San Francisco, CA 94110.
The lease is forfeited.
Past due rent - 2400.00
Holdover Damages - 1856.02
Costs - $240.00
Total - $4496.02
Defendants must pay pltf $28.57 for each day that they remain in the above premises after the entry of this judgment
Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-11-2011 Assigned To Trial Court
